name: Pork Steaks with Peppers
recipeIngredient: 3 Total Peppers (Red, Green, and Yellow Sweet Peppers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork steaks to be 1/2 inch thick. You should have 4 to 5 steaks.
2. Choose one of the following soup mixes: Onion, onion-Mushroom, or Beefy Mushroom.
3. Dice the selected peppers into thin strips (Red, Green, and Yellow Sweet Peppers).
4. Finely chop the garlic.
5. Coarsely chop the tomato.
6. Combine all ingredients in a bowl with 1 cup of water and 1/2 teaspoon thyme leaves and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
7. Mix until well combined.
